*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)

	aspectxy = op('indicator').width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	

	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('indicator').width / op('indicator').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	
	return

*�����������������!# me - this DAT
# par - the Par object that has changed
# val - the current value
# prev - the previous value
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Parameter Execute DAT.

def valueChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def onPulse(par):
	fb = op('feedback')
	fb['x','position'] = parent().par.Resetposx
	fb['y','position'] = parent().par.Resetposy
	fb['x','speed'] = fb['y','speed'] = 0	
	return

def expressionChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def exportChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def enableChange(par, val, prev):
	return

2
*�����������������,# put speed and position in feedback table

def frameEnd(frame):
	for v in ['x', 'y']:
		fb = op('feedback')
		
		position = op('position')[v].eval()
		speed = (position - fb[v,'position']) / op('time_slice')[0].eval()

		fb[v,'position'] = position
		
		if op('limit_min')[v]>0 :
			fb[v,'position'] = position + op('limit_min')[v]
			fb[v,'speed'] = -.7 * speed * op('ungrab')[0]
		elif op('limit_max')[v]<0 :
			fb[v,'position'] = position + op('limit_max')[v]
			fb[v,'speed'] = -.7 * speed * op('ungrab')[0]
		else :
			fb[v,'speed'] = speed
	return

*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')

	aspectxy = iconop.width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconop.width / iconop.height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

	for e in events:
		#print(absTime.frame, e.pickOp)
		
		if e.selectStart :
			op('finger_timers/timer' + str(int(e.row))).par.Select = 1
		if e.selectEnd :
			op('finger_timers/timer' + str(int(e.row))).par.Select = 0
		if e.select :
			op('finger_timers/timer' + str(int(e.row))).par.Elapsedtime = e.inValues['elapsedtime']

		if e.pickOp == None :
			continue
		
		geo = e.pickOp.parent()
		geoname = geo.name
		#print(geoname, e.select, e.selectStart, e.selectEnd)
		
		if geoname == 'reset' :
			if e.selectStart == True :
				op('reset_toss2d').run()					
			continue

		# look for a tag or use the Parent Shortcut
		#if geo.par.parentshortcut != 'Disc' :
		if not 'grabable' in geo.tags :
			continue
		
		state = geo.op('state')
		if e.selectEnd :
			geo.par.Drag = 0
			geo.par.Touches = 0
			
		elif e.selectStart :
			geo.par.Drag = 1
			geo.par.Touches = 1
			geo.par.Downu = e.u
			geo.par.Downv = e.v
			geo.par.Downx = ipar.Scene.Tx
			geo.par.Downy = ipar.Scene.Ty
			geo.par.X = ipar.Scene.Tx
			geo.par.Y = ipar.Scene.Ty
			
		if e.select :
			geo.par.X = ipar.Scene.Tx
			geo.par.Y = ipar.Scene.Ty			
			geo.par.U = e.u
			geo.par.V = e.v
	return
